instructions: ThumbGate Mobile (Hermes) is a real-users product (not Igor-only dogfood). Prioritize connect/onboarding regressions over style. Read .greptile/rules.md and hermes-mobile/.greptile/rules.md. Flag false-green Connected states, demo=1 review shortcuts treated as production proof, wrong Mac API keys, OTA-vs-native mistakes, and jargon ('gateway'/'LAN'/'Pair relay') in fresh-user UI copy.

rules.rule: Fresh-user onboarding must keep one primary CTA, numbered steps, and jargon-free copy (Your Mac / Home Wi-Fi / Find computers). Never introduce 'gateway', 'LAN', or 'Pair relay' in primary first-run or disconnected UI. Silent heal (~30s) must run before showing human recovery steps for returning users with saved profiles.

hermes://setup?demo=1 is ASC/review bootstrap only. Never treat demo=1, developerLeashUnlock, adb reverse, or pre-saved Igor profiles as proof that a stranger cold-start works. Flag tests/flows that hide ConnectMacGate via demo deep link and then claim onboarding/connect is verified.

Cellular/off-Wi-Fi must prefer Tailscale paths and copy; USB/adb reverse is Igor dogfood only and must not be required for real users. Do not let USB pairing hijack a healthy Wi-Fi/Tailscale primary. Connected UI requires authenticated probe success — /health 200 alone is not Connected.

Mac mini and MacBook Pro can have different API_SERVER_KEY values. Never paste or assume the laptop .env key for a mini Tailscale URL (or vice versa). Flag host→key mismatches, pair flows that rewrite primary to the wrong Mac while USB-cabled to another, and Connected+Wrong-key XOR violations.

JS/asset fixes ship via EAS OTA on the production channel; native changes (permissions, plugins, version/runtimeVersion bumps, native modules) require a new binary. Do not claim OTA can ship native-only fixes. Do not use expo run:android on a physical phone (Metro-only debug → black screen) — release install paths only.
